nasb.text: Woe to those who go down to Egypt for help And rely on horses, And trust in chariots because they are many And in horsemen because they are very strong, But they do not look to the Holy One of Israel, nor seek the Lord!

esv.text: Woe to those who go down to Egypt for help and rely on horses, who trust in chariots because they are many and in horsemen because they are very strong, but do not look to the Holy One of Israel or consult the Lord!

cnv.text: 那些下埃及求幫助， 倚靠馬匹， 倚靠眾多戰車， 依靠十分強壯的馬兵， 卻不仰望以色列的聖者，也不求問耶和華的，有禍了！

ccb.text: 那些到埃及寻求帮助的人有祸了！ 他们仰赖战马，倚靠众多的战车和强壮的骑兵， 却不仰望以色列的圣者， 不寻求耶和华。

csbs.text: 祸哉！那些下埃及求帮助的人！ 他们依仗马匹， 依靠战车众多、马兵强大， 却不仰望以色列的圣者， 也不寻求耶和华。
